Welcome to the official website of Baroness Floella Benjamin, OM DBE DL

Hello and welcome to my website. This is where you can find out everything you want to know about me. From my work as an actress, presenter, broadcaster and parliamentarian, to the work I do for charity.

October is ‘Black History Month’ and I have recorded a short celebratory message about the importance of knowing our history and looking to the future, because that’s where our destiny lies. Watch my video message here.

  • Floella on YouTube
  • My Life
  • News Archive
  • Gallery
  • My Podcast

My beloved mother ‘Marmie’ passed away in 2008… I miss her so, but feel her presence in everything I do, especially when I find a white feather which means she’s watching over me. A beautiful woman whose legacy lives on and will do forever through her children, her grandchildren and her great grand children. Sadly, she died from bowel cancer, that is why I am a patron of Bowel Cancer UK

Follow Floella on: Twitter Instagram
What's been happening?

BAFTA Fellowship acceptance speech at the BAFTA Television Awards in May 2024

Read More

Expanding Horizons: My Continued Journey with Champions Speakers

Working with Champions Speakers over the past five years has been nothing short of extraordinary. As someone who has spent a lifetime championing diversity, inclusion, and the power of resilience, I’ve always sought platforms that understand the importance of purpose-driven storytelling. Champions is one such platform — a leading UK keynote speakers agency that not only amplifies voices but aligns with my mission to make lasting change.

Read More
